name: Duck Hunting Game: Hunter Sniper VR

reviews.review_description:
Pretty fun game that invokes memories of losing your mind at a laughing dog.  The ducks are a little buggy, but still a fun game. 

Copyright must have worn out on the original Duck Hunt made by Nintendo.
i'd love this game so much i wish i could have the uh and they decoys
struggled. Gun too wiggly, graphics glitchy.

But the lack of guns really stinks especially since I'm not a shotgun type of guy more of an m22 but never the less it's fun but there should be an alien that hides inside the animals and when you shoot the infected the burst into a very rare boss thing

Omg..I love this game. The water on the ground in the puddles very  realistic. The game indicates that the ducks can see you ..so I like hiding in the bushes to stay out of birds eye view..lol.. The ability to do that makes it feel realistic. I only wish that either it had no timer, or a longer timer also, more bullets in the gun.  Maybe in the future, it could be the ability to choose different rifles/guns. I get a little frustrated that it takes a while for the gun to reload. By the time it does..the ducks disappear. But in all its still super fun. Also, zi noticed when I looked down I saw a faint image of a menu, yet I couldn't do anything with it. Does anyone know how to use it?

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thanks a lot! We are very glad to hear that you enjoyed the game. :) 
To open the menu you are talking about, you need to touch it with your hand. There you can change some settings, such as the speed of movement.

reviews.review_title: Terrible really bad even the video sucks
reviews.review_description: Stupid! the red dot doesn't even work it's the most stupid game I ever played!!!!!!🤬
Sometimes, the controls are clunky, and the game glitches sometimes, but give it a little slack people it's a free game from a solo developer.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your encouraging words! They really help us stay motivated to continue developing.

reviews.review_title: I hope you guys make it big
reviews.review_description: It’s really sad to see All the hate towards these developers. People don’t understand how hard it is to make a game. I love how well the developers handle haters it’s a true sign of maturity, you guys got this!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your words! it's really hard sometimes to stay positive and go ahead despite of hate. Thank you very much for your support!

reviews.review_description: Just brought this stupid game a few weeks ago tried everything still can't play it because the stupid game keeps freezing up they need too give me a refund on my money or fix this stupid crap 🤬🤬🤬🤬

developer_response.body: Thank you for your message. We are already working on a solution. This game is free. If you would like to make a refund for any purchase in the game, you may do so according to the instructions at www.meta.com.

reviews.review_title: If I code, I would read this half a star
reviews.review_description: This game is horrible. The graphics are horrible. The guns are horrible. It’s just bad and they actually think that you could get money off of it by just buying some calls to call turkeys and stuff is not OK. One star horrible
A lil bit of work could have been done tho 👌3 stars
The graphics are just horrible and that game feels like it was coded and made in two minutes.
Good selection of birds, would be even better if they added more options for types of game and locations but good overall.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your feedback! Could you please give us more details what types of game and locations you would like to add?

reviews.review_description: Edit: I originally couldn’t work out how to purchase the items in the shop. I’ve done it now and the game is fab! Really good fun!🦆 Graphics are good and I feel completely immersed when playing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! We would be grateful if you could tell us what should be corrected in the instructions? We will try to change them and make them more convenient.

reviews.review_description: It is sooo good I love it

developer_response.body: Many thanks! We're happy to hear you like our game
